This file is a merged representation of the entire codebase, combined into a single document by Repomix.
The content has been processed where comments have been removed, empty lines have been removed, line numbers have been added.

<file_summary>
This section contains a summary of this file.

<purpose>
This file contains a packed representation of the entire repository's contents.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.
</purpose>

<file_format>
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files (if enabled)
5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
  - File path as an attribute
  - Full contents of the file
</file_format>

<usage_guidelines>
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.
</usage_guidelines>

<notes>
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Code comments have been removed from supported file types
- Empty lines have been removed from all files
- Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)
</notes>

</file_summary>

  94:  4:     "maxFileSize": 52428800
  95:  5:   },
  96:  6:   "output": {
  97:  7:     "filePath": "repomix-output.xml",
  98:  8:     "style": "xml",
  99:  9:     "parsableStyle": false,
 100: 10:     "fileSummary": true,
 101: 11:     "directoryStructure": true,
 102: 12:     "files": true,
 103: 13:     "removeComments": true,
 104: 14:     "removeEmptyLines": true,
 105: 15:     "compress": false,
 106: 16:     "topFilesLength": 5,
 107: 17:     "showLineNumbers": true,
 108: 18:     "truncateBase64": false,
 109: 19:     "copyToClipboard": false,
 110: 20:     "includeFullDirectoryStructure": true,
 111: 21:     "tokenCountTree": true,
 112: 22:     "git": {
 113: 23:       "sortByChanges": true,
 114: 24:       "sortByChangesMaxCommits": 100,
 115: 25:       "includeDiffs": false,
 116: 26:       "includeLogs": false,
 117: 27:       "includeLogsCount": 50
 118: 28:     }
 119: 29:   },
 120: 30:   "include": [],
 121: 31:   "ignore": {
 122: 32:     "useGitignore": true,

 126: 36:   },

 147: <file path="packages/backend/KindnessApp/Kindness.yml">
 148:  1: info:
 149:  2:   name: Kindness
 150:  3:   type: http
 151:  4: http:
 152:  5:   method: POST
 153:  6:   url: http://localhost:5000/api/kindness
 154:  7:   auth: inherit
 155:  8: settings:
 156:  9:   encodeUrl: true
 157: 10:   timeout: 0
 158: 11:   followRedirects: true
 159: 12:   maxRedirects: 5
 160: </file>
 161: <file path="packages/backend/KindnessApp/KindnessLive.yml">
 162:  1: info:
 163:  2:   name: KindnessLive
 164:  3:   type: http
 165:  4: http:
 166:  5:   method: POST
 167:  6:   url: https://kindnessapp.onrender.com/api/kindness
 168:  7:   body:
 169:  8:     type: json
 170:  9:     data: |
 171: 10:       {
 172: 11:         "userId": "6a24fc36ff0f444f26dc17ce",
 173: 12:         "category": "Helping Hand",
 174: 13:         "description": "Helped a colleague debug a complex database query for over an hour."
 175: 14:       }
 176: 15:   auth: inherit
 177: 16: settings:
 178: 17:   encodeUrl: true
 179: 18:   timeout: 0
 180: 19:   followRedirects: true
 181: 20:   maxRedirects: 5
 182: </file>
 183: <file path="packages/backend/KindnessApp/LiveUsers.yml">

 187:  4: http:
 188:  5:   method: POST
 189:  6:   url: https://kindnessapp.onrender.com/api/users
 190:  7:   body:
 191:  8:     type: json
 192:  9:     data: |-
 193: 10:       {
 194: 11:         "name": "Test2"
 195: 12:       }
 196: 13:   auth: inherit
 197: 14: settings:
 198: 15:   encodeUrl: true
 199: 16:   timeout: 0
 200: 17:   followRedirects: true
 201: 18:   maxRedirects: 5
 202: </file>

 214: <file path="packages/backend/KindnessApp/Users.yml">
 215:  1: info:
 216:  2:   name: Users
 217:  3:   type: http
 218:  4:   seq: 1
 219:  5: http:
 220:  6:   method: POST
 221:  7:   url: http://localhost:5000/api/users
 222:  8:   body:
 223:  9:     type: json
 224: 10:     data: |-
 225: 11:       {
 226: 12:         "name": "Test1"
 227: 13:       }
 228: 14:   auth: inherit
 229: 15: settings:
 230: 16:   encodeUrl: true
 231: 17:   timeout: 0
 232: 18:   followRedirects: true
 233: 19:   maxRedirects: 5
 234: </file>
 235: <file path="packages/backend/src/config/database.ts">
 236:  1: import mongoose from 'mongoose';
 237:  2: mongoose.connection.on('error', (err) => {
 238:  3:   console.error('[database]: MongoDB connection error:', err);
 239:  4: });
 240:  5: mongoose.connection.on('disconnected', () => {
 241:  6:   console.warn('[database]: MongoDB connection disconnected.');
 242:  7: });
 243:  8: export async function disconnectDatabase(): Promise<void> {
 244:  9:   try {
 245: 10:     console.log('[database]: Disconnecting from MongoDB...');
 246: 11:     await mongoose.connection.close();
 247: 12:     console.log('[database]: Successfully disconnected from MongoDB.');
 248: 13:   } catch (error) {
 249: 14:     console.error('[database]: Error disconnecting from MongoDB:', error);
 250: 15:     throw error;
 251: 16:   }
 252: 17: }
 253: 18: export async function connectDatabase(): Promise<void> {
 254: 19:   const databaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL;
 255: 20:   if (!databaseUrl) {
 256: 21:     console.error('[database]: DATABASE_URL is not defined in environment variables.');
 257: 22:     process.exit(1);
 258: 23:   }
 259: 24:   try {
 260: 25:     console.log('[database]: Connecting to MongoDB...');
 261: 26:     await mongoose.connect(databaseUrl);
 262: 27:     console.log('[database]: Successfully connected to MongoDB.');
 263: 28:   } catch (error) {
 264: 29:     console.error('[database]: Error connecting to MongoDB:', error);
 265: 30:     process.exit(1);
 266: 31:   }
 267: 32: }
 268: </file>
 269: <file path="packages/backend/src/controllers/user.controller.ts">
 270:  1: import { Request, Response } from 'express';
 271:  2: import { UserSchema } from '@kindness/shared';
 272:  3: import { UserModel } from '../models/User.js';
 273:  4: export const createUser = async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
 274:  5:   try {
 275:  6:     const validationResult = UserSchema.safeParse(req.body);
 276:  7:     if (!validationResult.success) {
 277:  8:       res.status(400).json({
 278:  9:         message: 'Validation failed',
 279: 10:         errors: validationResult.error.format()
 280: 11:       });
 281: 12:       return;
 282: 13:     }
 283: 14:     const { name } = validationResult.data;
 284: 15:     const existingUser = await UserModel.findOne({ name });
 285: 16:     if (existingUser) {
 286: 17:       res.status(409).json({
 287: 18:         message: `An individual named "${name}" is already pre-populated in the system.`
 288: 19:       });
 289: 20:       return;
 290: 21:     }
 291: 22:     const newUser = await UserModel.create({ name });
 292: 23:     res.status(201).json({
 293: 24:       message: 'User created successfully!',
 294: 25:       data: newUser
 295: 26:     });
 296: 27:   } catch (error) {
 297: 28:     console.error('[user.controller]: Error creating user:', error);
 298: 29:     res.status(500).json({
 299: 30:       message: 'An internal server error occurred while processing your request.'
 300: 31:     });
 301: 32:   }
 302: 33: };
 303: </file>
 304: <file path="packages/backend/src/models/KindnessLog.ts">
 305:  1: import { Schema, model, Types } from 'mongoose';
 306:  2: import { type KindnessLog, CATEGORY_LABELS } from '@kindness/shared';
 307:  3: export interface IKindnessLog extends Omit<KindnessLog, 'userId' | 'personName' | 'description'> {
 308:  4:   userId: Types.ObjectId;
 309:  5:   description?: string;
 310:  6:   pointsEarned: number;
 311:  7:   createdAt?: Date;
 312:  8:   updatedAt?: Date;
 313:  9: }
 314: 10: const KindnessLogSchema = new Schema<IKindnessLog>(
 315: 11:   {
 316: 12:     userId: {
 317: 13:       type: Schema.Types.ObjectId,
 318: 14:       ref: 'User',
 319: 15:       required: true,
 320: 16:       index: true,
 321: 17:     },
 322: 18:     category: {
 323: 19:       type: String,
 324: 20:       required: [true, 'Category is required'],
 325: 21:       enum: {
 326: 22:         values: CATEGORY_LABELS,
 327: 23:         message: '{VALUE} is not a valid kindness category',
 328: 24:       },
 329: 25:     },
 330: 26:     pointsEarned: {
 331: 27:       type: Number,
 332: 28:       required: [true, 'Points earned is required'],
 333: 29:       min: [1, 'Points must be a positive number'],
 334: 30:     },
 335: 31:     description: {
 336: 32:       type: String,
 337: 33:       trim: true,
 338: 34:       maxlength: [200, 'Description cannot exceed 200 characters'],
 339: 35:     },
 340: 36:   },
 341: 37:   {
 342: 38:     timestamps: true,
 343: 39:   }
 344: 40: );
 345: 41: export const KindnessLogModel = model<IKindnessLog>('KindnessLog', KindnessLogSchema);
 346: </file>
 347: <file path="packages/backend/src/models/User.ts">
 348:  1: import { Schema, model } from 'mongoose';
 349:  2: export interface IUser {
 350:  3:   name: string;
 351:  4:   createdAt?: Date;
 352:  5:   updatedAt?: Date;
 353:  6: }
 354:  7: const UserSchema = new Schema<IUser>(
 355:  8:   {
 356:  9:     name: {
 357: 10:       type: String,
 358: 11:       required: [true, 'User name is required'],
 359: 12:       trim: true,
 360: 13:       unique: true,
 361: 14:     },
 362: 15:   },
 363: 16:   {
 364: 17:     timestamps: true,
 365: 18:   }
 366: 19: );
 367: 20: export const UserModel = model<IUser>('User', UserSchema);
 368: </file>
 369: <file path="packages/backend/src/routes/user.routes.ts">
 370: 1: import { Router, Request, Response, NextFunction, RequestHandler } from 'express';
 371: 2: import { createUser } from '../controllers/user.controller.js';
 372: 3: const router = Router();
 373: 4: const asyncHandler = (fn: (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => Promise<unknown>): RequestHandler =>
 374: 5:   (req, res, next) => {
 375: 6:     Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
 376: 7:   };
 377: 8: router.post('/', asyncHandler(createUser));
 378: 9: export default router;
 379: </file>
 380: <file path="packages/frontend/postcss.config.js">
 381: 1: export default {
 382: 2:   plugins: {
 383: 3:     tailwindcss: {},
 384: 4:     autoprefixer: {},
 385: 5:   },
 386: 6: };
 387: </file>
 388: <file path="packages/frontend/src/vite-env.d.ts">
 389: 1:
 390: </file>
 391: <file path="packages/frontend/tailwind.config.js">
 392:  1: export default {
 393:  2:   content: ['./index.html', './src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}', '../shared/src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}'],
 394:  3:   theme: {
 395:  4:     extend: {
 396:  5:       fontFamily: {
 397:  6:         sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
 398:  7:       },
 399:  8:     },
 400:  9:   },
 401: 10:   plugins: [],
 402: 11: };
 403: </file>

 406:  2:   "compilerOptions": {
 407:  3:     "composite": true,
 408:  4:     "module": "ESNext",
 409:  5:     "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
 410:  6:     "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
 411:  7:     "strict": true,
 412:  8:     "skipLibCheck": true
 413:  9:   },
 414: 10:   "include": ["vite.config.ts"]
 415: 11: }

 471: </file>
 472: <file path="eslint.config.js">
 473:  1: import js from '@eslint/js';
 474:  2: import tseslint from 'typescript-eslint';
 475:  3: import reactPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-react';
 476:  4: import reactHooksPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-react-hooks';
 477:  5: import reactRefreshPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-react-refresh';
 478:  6: import tailwindPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-tailwindcss';
 479:  7: import globals from 'globals';
 480:  8: import path from 'path';
 481:  9: import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
 482: 10: const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
 483: 11: const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
 484: 12: const tailwindConfigPath = path.resolve(__dirname, 'packages/frontend/tailwind.config.js');
 485: 13: export default tseslint.config(
 486: 14:   {
 487: 15:     ignores: [
 488: 16:       '**/dist/**',
 489: 17:       '**/build/**',
 490: 18:       '**/node_modules/**',
 491: 19:       'eslint.config.js',
 492: 20:       'prettier.config.js',
 493: 21:       'tailwind.config.js',
 494: 22:       'postcss.config.js',
 495: 23:       'vite.config.ts',
 496: 24:     ],
 497: 25:   },
 498: 26:   js.configs.recommended,
 499: 27:   ...tseslint.configs.recommended,
 500: 28:   ...tseslint.configs.strict,
 501: 29:   ...tseslint.configs.stylistic,
 502: 30:   {
 503: 31:     files: ['**/*.ts', '**/*.tsx'],
 504: 32:     languageOptions: {
 505: 33:       parser: tseslint.parser,
 506: 34:       parserOptions: {
 507: 35:         ecmaVersion: 'latest',
 508: 36:         sourceType: 'module',
 509: 37:       },
 510: 38:       globals: {
 511: 39:         ...globals.browser,
 512: 40:         ...globals.node,
 513: 41:         ...globals.es2022,
 514: 42:       },
 515: 43:     },
 516: 44:     rules: {
 517: 45:       '@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any': 'error',
 518: 46:       '@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars': [
 519: 47:         'error',
 520: 48:         { argsIgnorePattern: '^_', varsIgnorePattern: '^_' },
 521: 49:       ],
 522: 50:     },
 523: 51:   },
 524: 52:   {
 525: 53:     ...reactPlugin.configs.flat.recommended,
 526: 54:     ...reactPlugin.configs.flat['jsx-runtime'],
 527: 55:     files: ['packages/frontend/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}'],
 528: 56:     plugins: {
 529: 57:       ...reactPlugin.configs.flat.recommended.plugins,
 530: 58:       ...reactPlugin.configs.flat['jsx-runtime'].plugins,
 531: 59:       'react-hooks': reactHooksPlugin,
 532: 60:       'react-refresh': reactRefreshPlugin,
 533: 61:       tailwindcss: tailwindPlugin,
 534: 62:     },
 535: 63:     rules: {
 536: 64:       ...reactPlugin.configs.flat.recommended.rules,
 537: 65:       ...reactPlugin.configs.flat['jsx-runtime'].rules,
 538: 66:       'react-hooks/rules-of-hooks': 'error',
 539: 67:       'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps': 'warn',
 540: 68:       'react-refresh/only-export-components': ['warn', { allowConstantExport: true }],
 541: 69:       'tailwindcss/classnames-order': 'warn',
 542: 70:       'tailwindcss/enforces-negative-arbitrary-values': 'warn',
 543: 71:       'tailwindcss/enforces-shorthand': 'warn',
 544: 72:       'tailwindcss/no-contradicting-classname': 'error',
 545: 73:       'tailwindcss/no-custom-classname': 'off',
 546: 74:     },
 547: 75:     settings: {
 548: 76:       react: {
 549: 77:         version: 'detect',
 550: 78:       },
 551: 79:       tailwindcss: {
 552: 80:         callees: ['classnames', 'clsx', 'ctl'],
 553: 81:         config: tailwindConfigPath,
 554: 82:       },
 555: 83:     },
 556: 84:   },
 557: 85: );
 558: </file>
 559: <file path="packages/backend/KindnessApp/GetKindnessLogsByUser.yml">
 560:  1: info:
 561:  2:   name: Get Kindness Logs By User
 562:  3:   type: http
 563:  4:   seq: 1
 564:  5: http:
 565:  6:   method: GET
 566:  7:   url: https://kindnessapp.onrender.com/api/kindness/user/6a24ef9c5e1f33791367314a
 567:  8:   auth: inherit
 568:  9: settings:
 569: 10:   encodeUrl: true
 570: 11:   timeout: 0
 571: 12:   followRedirects: true
 572: 13:   maxRedirects: 5
 573: </file>
 574: <file path="packages/backend/src/controllers/kindness.controller.ts">
 575:  1: import { Request, Response } from 'express';
 576:  2: import { Types } from 'mongoose';
 577:  3: import { KindnessLogSchema, KINDNESS_CATEGORIES } from '@kindness/shared';
 578:  4: import { KindnessLogModel } from '../models/KindnessLog.js';
 579:  5: import { UserModel } from '../models/User.js';
 580:  6: export const createKindnessLog = async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
 581:  7:   try {
 582:  8:     const validationResult = KindnessLogSchema.safeParse(req.body);
 583:  9:     if (!validationResult.success) {
 584: 10:       res.status(400).json({
 585: 11:         message: 'Validation failed',
 586: 12:         errors: validationResult.error.format()
 587: 13:       });
 588: 14:       return;
 589: 15:     }
 590: 16:     const { userId, category, description } = validationResult.data;
 591: 17:     const matchedCategoryConfig = Object.values(KINDNESS_CATEGORIES).find(
 592: 18:       (c) => c.label === category
 593: 19:     );
 594: 20:     if (!matchedCategoryConfig) {
 595: 21:       res.status(500).json({
 596: 22:         message: 'Configuration error: Category point mapping not found.'
 597: 23:       });
 598: 24:       return;
 599: 25:     }
 600: 26:     const pointsEarned = matchedCategoryConfig.points;
 601: 27:     const newLog = await KindnessLogModel.create({
 602: 28:       userId,
 603: 29:       category,
 604: 30:       pointsEarned,
 605: 31:       description
 606: 32:     });
 607: 33:     res.status(201).json({
 608: 34:       message: 'Kindness recorded successfully!',
 609: 35:       data: newLog
 610: 36:     });
 611: 37:   } catch (error) {
 612: 38:     console.error('[kindness.controller]: Error creating log:', error);
 613: 39:     res.status(500).json({
 614: 40:       message: 'An internal server error occurred while processing your request.'
 615: 41:     });
 616: 42:   }
 617: 43: };
 618: 44: export const getKindnessLogsByUser = async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
 619: 45:   try {
 620: 46:     const { userId } = req.params;
 621: 47:     if (!userId || !Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
 622: 48:       res.status(400).json({
 623: 49:         message: 'Invalid user ID format.'
 624: 50:       });
 625: 51:       return;
 626: 52:     }
 627: 53:     const userExists = await UserModel.exists({ _id: userId });
 628: 54:     if (!userExists) {
 629: 55:       res.status(404).json({
 630: 56:         message: 'User not found.'
 631: 57:       });
 632: 58:       return;
 633: 59:     }
 634: 60:     const logs = await KindnessLogModel.find({ userId }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
 635: 61:     res.status(200).json({
 636: 62:       message: 'Kindness logs retrieved successfully.',
 637: 63:       data: logs
 638: 64:     });
 639: 65:   } catch (error) {
 640: 66:     console.error('[kindness.controller]: Error getting logs for user:', error);
 641: 67:     res.status(500).json({
 642: 68:       message: 'An internal server error occurred while processing your request.'
 643: 69:     });
 644: 70:   }
 645: 71: };
 646: </file>
 647: <file path="packages/backend/src/routes/kindness.routes.ts">
 648:  1: import { Router, Request, Response, NextFunction, RequestHandler } from 'express';
 649:  2: import { createKindnessLog, getKindnessLogsByUser } from '../controllers/kindness.controller.js';
 650:  3: const router = Router();
 651:  4: const asyncHandler = (fn: (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => Promise<unknown>): RequestHandler =>
 652:  5:   (req, res, next) => {
 653:  6:     Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
 654:  7:   };
 655:  8: router.post('/', asyncHandler(createKindnessLog));
 656:  9: router.get('/user/:userId', asyncHandler(getKindnessLogsByUser));
 657: 10: export default router;
 658: </file>
 659: <file path="packages/backend/tsconfig.json">
 660:  1: {
 661:  2:   "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json",
 662:  3:   "compilerOptions": {
 663:  4:     "outDir": "./dist",
 664:  5:     "rootDir": "./src",
 665:  6:     "composite": true
 666:  7:   },
 667:  8:   "references": [{ "path": "../shared" }],
 668:  9:   "include": ["src/**/*"]
 669: 10: }
 670: </file>
 671: <file path="packages/frontend/index.html">
 672:  1: <!doctype html>
 673:  2: <html lang="en">
 674:  3:   <head>
 675:  4:     <meta charset="UTF-8" />
 676:  5:     <link
 677:  6:       rel="icon"
 678:  7:       type="image/svg+xml"
 679:  8:       href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>💖</text></svg>"
 680:  9:     />
 681: 10:     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
 682: 11:     <title>KindnessApp Monorepo</title>
 683: 12:     <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
 684: 13:     <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
 685: 14:     <link
 686: 15:       href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap"
 687: 16:       rel="stylesheet"
 688: 17:     />
 689: 18:   </head>
 690: 19:   <body class="min-h-screen bg-slate-950 text-slate-100">
 691: 20:     <div id="root"></div>
 692: 21:     <script type="module" src="/src/main.tsx"></script>
 693: 22:   </body>
 694: 23: </html>

 782: 10:     "noImplicitAny": true,
 783: 11:     "strictNullChecks": true,
 784: 12:     "strictFunctionTypes": true,

 823:  3:   "version": "1.0.0",
 824:  4:   "private": true,
 825:  5:   "type": "module",
 826:  6:   "engines": {
 827:  7:     "node": ">=18.0.0"
 828:  8:   },

 830: 10:     "packages/*"
 831: 11:   ],
 832: 12:   "scripts": {
 833: 13:     "build": "tsc --build",
 834: 14:     "build:clean": "tsc --build --clean",
 835: 15:     "dev:shared": "tsc --build packages/shared --watch",
 836: 16:     "dev:backend": "npm run dev --workspace=@kindness/backend",
 837: 17:     "dev:frontend": "npm run dev --workspace=@kindness/frontend",
 838: 18:     "dev": "concurrently -n \"shared,backend,frontend\" -c \"blue,green,magenta\" \"npm run dev:shared\" \"npm run dev:backend\" \"npm run dev:frontend\"",
 839: 19:     "lint": "eslint .",
 840: 20:     "format": "prettier --write ."
 841: 21:   },
 842: 22:   "devDependencies": {
 843: 23:     "@eslint/js": "^9.4.0",
 844: 24:     "@types/node": "^20.14.2",

 866: <file path="packages/backend/package.json">
 867:  1: {
 868:  2:   "name": "@kindness/backend",
 869:  3:   "version": "1.0.0",
 870:  4:   "private": true,
 871:  5:   "type": "module",
 872:  6:   "main": "./dist/index.js",
 873:  7:   "scripts": {
 874:  8:     "build": "tsc",
 875:  9:     "dev": "tsx watch src/index.ts",
 876: 10:     "start": "node dist/index.js"
 877: 11:   },
 878: 12:   "dependencies": {
 879: 13:     "@kindness/shared": "*",
 880: 14:     "cors": "^2.8.5",
 881: 15:     "dotenv": "^16.4.5",
 882: 16:     "express": "^4.19.2",
 883: 17:     "mongoose": "^9.6.3"
 884: 18:   },
 885: 19:   "devDependencies": {
 886: 20:     "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
 887: 21:     "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
 888: 22:     "tsx": "^4.15.2"
 889: 23:   }
 890: 24: }
 891: </file>
 892: <file path="packages/backend/src/index.ts">
 893:  1: import 'dotenv/config';
 894:  2: import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
 895:  3: import cors from 'cors';
 896:  4: import { Server } from 'http';
 897:  5: import { connectDatabase, disconnectDatabase } from './config/database.js';
 898:  6: import kindnessRoutes from './routes/kindness.routes.js';
 899:  7: import userRoutes from './routes/user.routes.js';
 900:  8: const app = express();
 901:  9: const port = process.env.PORT || 5000;
 902: 10: const allowedOrigin = process.env.FRONTEND_URL || 'http://localhost:3000';
 903: 11: app.use(
 904: 12:   cors({
 905: 13:     origin: allowedOrigin,
 906: 14:     credentials: true,
 907: 15:   })
 908: 16: );
 909: 17: app.use(express.json({ limit: '10kb' }));
 910: 18: app.use('/api/kindness', kindnessRoutes);
 911: 19: app.use('/api/users', userRoutes);
 912: 20: app.use((_req: Request, res: Response) => {
 913: 21:   res.status(404).json({ message: 'Resource not found' });
 914: 22: });
 915: 23: app.use((err: unknown, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
 916: 24:   console.error('[server]: Unhandled error:', err);
 917: 25:   res.status(500).json({ message: 'An internal server error occurred.' });
 918: 26: });
 919: 27: let server: Server;
 920: 28: async function startServer() {
 921: 29:   try {
 922: 30:     await connectDatabase();
 923: 31:     server = app.listen(port, () => {
 924: 32:       console.log(`[server]: Backend API running on http://localhost:${port}`);
 925: 33:     });
 926: 34:   } catch (error) {
 927: 35:     console.error('[server]: Error starting server:', error);
 928: 36:     process.exit(1);
 929: 37:   }
 930: 38: }
 931: 39: async function handleShutdown(signal: string) {
 932: 40:   console.log(`[server]: Received ${signal}. Starting graceful shutdown...`);
 933: 41:   if (server) {
 934: 42:     server.close(async (err) => {
 935: 43:       if (err) {
 936: 44:         console.error('[server]: Error closing HTTP server:', err);
 937: 45:       } else {
 938: 46:         console.log('[server]: HTTP server closed.');
 939: 47:       }
 940: 48:       try {
 941: 49:         await disconnectDatabase();
 942: 50:         process.exit(0);
 943: 51:       } catch (dbErr) {
 944: 52:         console.error('[server]: Error during database disconnection:', dbErr);
 945: 53:         process.exit(1);
 946: 54:       }
 947: 55:     });
 948: 56:   } else {
 949: 57:     try {
 950: 58:       await disconnectDatabase();
 951: 59:       process.exit(0);
 952: 60:     } catch (dbErr) {
 953: 61:       console.error('[server]: Error during database disconnection:', dbErr);
 954: 62:       process.exit(1);
 955: 63:     }
 956: 64:   }
 957: 65: }
 958: 66: process.on('SIGINT', () => handleShutdown('SIGINT'));
 959: 67: process.on('SIGTERM', () => handleShutdown('SIGTERM'));
 960: 68: startServer();
 961: </file>
 962: <file path="packages/frontend/package.json">
 963:  1: {
 964:  2:   "name": "@kindness/frontend",
 965:  3:   "version": "1.0.0",
 966:  4:   "private": true,
 967:  5:   "type": "module",
 968:  6:   "scripts": {
 969:  7:     "dev": "vite",
 970:  8:     "build": "vite build",
 971:  9:     "preview": "vite preview"
 972: 10:   },
 973: 11:   "dependencies": {
 974: 12:     "@kindness/shared": "*",
 975: 13:     "react": "^18.3.1",
 976: 14:     "react-dom": "^18.3.1"
 977: 15:   },
 978: 16:   "devDependencies": {
 979: 17:     "@types/react": "^18.3.3",
 980: 18:     "@types/react-dom": "^18.3.0",
 981: 19:     "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.0",
 982: 20:     "autoprefixer": "^10.4.19",
 983: 21:     "postcss": "^8.4.38",
 984: 22:     "tailwindcss": "^3.4.4",
 985: 23:     "vite": "^6.4.3",
 986: 24:     "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^4.3.2"
 987: 25:   }
 988: 26: }
 989: </file>
 990: <file path="packages/frontend/src/App.tsx">
 991:  1: export const App = () => {
 992:  2:   return (
 993:  3:     <div className="flex min-h-screen flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-50 p-6 text-center">
 994:  4:       <div className="max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 bg-white p-8 shadow-xl">
 995:  5:         <h1 className="mb-2 text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900">
 996:  6:           Kindness Tracker
 997:  7:         </h1>
 998:  8:         <p className="mb-6 text-slate-600">
 999:  9:           Your full-stack monorepo workspace is officially wired and ready for feature building!
1000: 10:         </p>
1001: 11:         <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-700">
1002: 12:           <span className="size-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>
1003: 13:           Shared Contract Active
1004: 14:         </div>
1005: 15:       </div>
1006: 16:     </div>
1007: 17:   );
1008: 18: };
1009: </file>
1010: <file path="packages/frontend/src/index.css">
1011:  1: @tailwind base;
1012:  2: @tailwind components;
1013:  3: @tailwind utilities;
1014:  4: @layer base {
1015:  5:   body {
1016:  6:     font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
1017:  7:     @apply bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 antialiased;
1018:  8:   }
1019:  9:   h1,
1020: 10:   h2,
1021: 11:   h3,
1022: 12:   h4,
1023: 13:   h5,
1024: 14:   h6 {
1025: 15:     font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
1026: 16:   }
1027: 17: }
1028: 18: .glow-card {
1029: 19:   position: relative;
1030: 20:   background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6);
1031: 21:   backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
1032: 22:   border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
1033: 23: }
1034: 24: .glow-card::before {
1035: 25:   content: '';
1036: 26:   position: absolute;
1037: 27:   inset: -1px;
1038: 28:   border-radius: inherit;
1039: 29:   padding: 1px;
1040: 30:   background: linear-gradient(
1041: 31:     to bottom right,
1042: 32:     rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.4),
1043: 33:     rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4),
1044: 34:     transparent
1045: 35:   );
1046: 36:   -webkit-mask:
1047: 37:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,
1048: 38:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
1049: 39:   mask:
1050: 40:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,
1051: 41:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
1052: 42:   -webkit-mask-composite: xor;
1053: 43:   mask-composite: exclude;
1054: 44:   pointer-events: none;
1055: 45: }
1056: </file>
1057: <file path="packages/frontend/src/main.tsx">
1058:  1: import React from 'react';
1059:  2: import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client';
1060:  3: import { App } from './App.js';
1061:  4: import './index.css';
1062:  5: const container = document.getElementById('root');
1063:  6: if (container) {
1064:  7:   ReactDOM.createRoot(container).render(
1065:  8:     <React.StrictMode>
1066:  9:       <App />
1067: 10:     </React.StrictMode>
1068: 11:   );
1069: 12: }
1070: </file>
1071: <file path="packages/shared/src/index.ts">
1072:  1: import { z } from 'zod';
1073:  2: export const CATEGORY_LABELS = [
1074:  3:   'Kind Words',
1075:  4:   'Helping Hand',
1076:  5:   'Sharing & Generosity',
1077:  6:   'Special Surprise'
1078:  7: ] as const;
1079:  8: export const KINDNESS_CATEGORIES = {
1080:  9:   WORDS: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[0], points: 10 },
1081: 10:   HELPING: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[1], points: 20 },
1082: 11:   SHARING: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[2], points: 15 },
1083: 12:   CUSTOM: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[3], points: 25 }
1084: 13: } as const;
1085: 14: export const UserSchema = z.object({
1086: 15:   name: z
1087: 16:     .string()
1088: 17:     .trim()
1089: 18:     .min(1, 'Name is required')
1090: 19:     .max(100, 'Name cannot exceed 100 characters')
1091: 20: });
1092: 21: export const KindnessLogSchema = z.object({
1093: 22:   userId: z
1094: 23:     .string()
1095: 24:     .min(1, 'A valid user ID is required'),
1096: 25:   category: z.enum(CATEGORY_LABELS, {
1097: 26:     errorMap: () => ({ message: 'Please select a valid kindness category' })
1098: 27:   }),
1099: 28:   description: z
1100: 29:     .string()
1101: 30:     .trim()
1102: 31:     .max(200, 'Description cannot exceed 200 characters')
1103: 32:     .optional()
1104: 33:     .transform(val => (val === '' ? undefined : val))
1105: 34: });
1106: 35: export type User = z.infer<typeof UserSchema>;
1107: 36: export type KindnessCategoryMap = typeof KINDNESS_CATEGORIES;
1108: 37: export type KindnessLog = z.infer<typeof KindnessLogSchema>;
1109: </file>
1110: </files>
</file>

<file path="repomix.config.json">
 1: {
 2:   "$schema": "https://repomix.com/schemas/latest/schema.json",
 3:   "input": {
 4:     "maxFileSize": 52428800
 5:   },
 6:   "output": {
 7:     "filePath": "repomix-output.txt",
 8:     "style": "xml",
 9:     "parsableStyle": false,
10:     "fileSummary": true,
11:     "directoryStructure": true,
12:     "files": true,
13:     "removeComments": true,
14:     "removeEmptyLines": true,
15:     "compress": false,
16:     "topFilesLength": 5,
17:     "showLineNumbers": true,
18:     "truncateBase64": false,
19:     "copyToClipboard": false,
20:     "includeFullDirectoryStructure": true,
21:     "tokenCountTree": true,
22:     "git": {
23:       "sortByChanges": true,
24:       "sortByChangesMaxCommits": 100,
25:       "includeDiffs": false,
26:       "includeLogs": false,
27:       "includeLogsCount": 50
28:     }
29:   },

42:   }

 2:   "semi": true,
 3:   "singleQuote": true,
 4:   "tabWidth": 2,
 5:   "trailingComma": "all",

 7:   "bracketSpacing": true,

 4: http:
 5:   method: POST
 6:   url: http://localhost:5000/api/kindness
 7:   auth: inherit
 8: settings:
 9:   encodeUrl: true
10:   timeout: 0
11:   followRedirects: true
12:   maxRedirects: 5

 2:   name: KindnessLive
 3:   type: http
 4: http:
 5:   method: POST
 6:   url: https://kindnessapp.onrender.com/api/kindness
 7:   body:
 8:     type: json
 9:     data: |
10:       {
11:         "userId": "6a24fc36ff0f444f26dc17ce",
12:         "category": "Helping Hand",
13:         "description": "Helped a colleague debug a complex database query for over an hour."
14:       }
15:   auth: inherit
16: settings:
17:   encodeUrl: true
18:   timeout: 0
19:   followRedirects: true
20:   maxRedirects: 5

<file path="packages/backend/src/config/database.ts">
 1: import mongoose from 'mongoose';
 2: mongoose.connection.on('error', (err) => {
 3:   console.error('[database]: MongoDB connection error:', err);
 4: });
 5: mongoose.connection.on('disconnected', () => {
 6:   console.warn('[database]: MongoDB connection disconnected.');
 7: });
 8: export async function disconnectDatabase(): Promise<void> {
 9:   try {
10:     console.log('[database]: Disconnecting from MongoDB...');
11:     await mongoose.connection.close();
12:     console.log('[database]: Successfully disconnected from MongoDB.');
13:   } catch (error) {
14:     console.error('[database]: Error disconnecting from MongoDB:', error);
15:     throw error;
16:   }
17: }
18: export async function connectDatabase(): Promise<void> {
19:   const databaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL;
20:   if (!databaseUrl) {
21:     console.error('[database]: DATABASE_URL is not defined in environment variables.');
22:     process.exit(1);
23:   }
24:   try {
25:     console.log('[database]: Connecting to MongoDB...');
26:     await mongoose.connect(databaseUrl);
27:     console.log('[database]: Successfully connected to MongoDB.');
28:   } catch (error) {
29:     console.error('[database]: Error connecting to MongoDB:', error);
30:     process.exit(1);
31:   }
32: }
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/controllers/user.controller.ts">
 1: import { Request, Response } from 'express';
 2: import { UserSchema } from '@kindness/shared';
 3: import { UserModel } from '../models/User.js';
 4: export const createUser = async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
 5:   try {
 6:     const validationResult = UserSchema.safeParse(req.body);
 7:     if (!validationResult.success) {
 8:       res.status(400).json({
 9:         message: 'Validation failed',
10:         errors: validationResult.error.format()
11:       });
12:       return;
13:     }
14:     const { name } = validationResult.data;
15:     const existingUser = await UserModel.findOne({ name });
16:     if (existingUser) {
17:       res.status(409).json({
18:         message: `An individual named "${name}" is already pre-populated in the system.`
19:       });
20:       return;
21:     }
22:     const newUser = await UserModel.create({ name });
23:     res.status(201).json({
24:       message: 'User created successfully!',
25:       data: newUser
26:     });
27:   } catch (error) {
28:     console.error('[user.controller]: Error creating user:', error);
29:     res.status(500).json({
30:       message: 'An internal server error occurred while processing your request.'
31:     });
32:   }
33: };
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/models/KindnessLog.ts">
 1: import { Schema, model, Types } from 'mongoose';
 2: import { type KindnessLog, CATEGORY_LABELS } from '@kindness/shared';
 3: export interface IKindnessLog extends Omit<KindnessLog, 'userId' | 'personName' | 'description'> {
 4:   userId: Types.ObjectId;
 5:   description?: string;
 6:   pointsEarned: number;
 7:   createdAt?: Date;
 8:   updatedAt?: Date;
 9: }
10: const KindnessLogSchema = new Schema<IKindnessLog>(
11:   {
12:     userId: {
13:       type: Schema.Types.ObjectId,
14:       ref: 'User',
15:       required: true,
16:       index: true,
17:     },
18:     category: {
19:       type: String,
20:       required: [true, 'Category is required'],
21:       enum: {
22:         values: CATEGORY_LABELS,
23:         message: '{VALUE} is not a valid kindness category',
24:       },
25:     },
26:     pointsEarned: {
27:       type: Number,
28:       required: [true, 'Points earned is required'],
29:       min: [1, 'Points must be a positive number'],
30:     },
31:     description: {
32:       type: String,
33:       trim: true,
34:       maxlength: [200, 'Description cannot exceed 200 characters'],
35:     },
36:   },
37:   {
38:     timestamps: true,
39:   }
40: );
41: export const KindnessLogModel = model<IKindnessLog>('KindnessLog', KindnessLogSchema);
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/models/User.ts">
 1: import { Schema, model } from 'mongoose';
 2: export interface IUser {
 3:   name: string;
 4:   createdAt?: Date;
 5:   updatedAt?: Date;
 6: }
 7: const UserSchema = new Schema<IUser>(
 8:   {
 9:     name: {
10:       type: String,
11:       required: [true, 'User name is required'],
12:       trim: true,
13:       unique: true,
14:     },
15:   },
16:   {
17:     timestamps: true,
18:   }
19: );
20: export const UserModel = model<IUser>('User', UserSchema);
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/routes/user.routes.ts">
1: import { Router, Request, Response, NextFunction, RequestHandler } from 'express';
2: import { createUser } from '../controllers/user.controller.js';
3: const router = Router();
4: const asyncHandler = (fn: (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => Promise<unknown>): RequestHandler =>
5:   (req, res, next) => {
6:     Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
7:   };
8: router.post('/', asyncHandler(createUser));
9: export default router;
</file>

2:   plugins: {
3:     tailwindcss: {},
4:     autoprefixer: {},
5:   },
6: };
</file>

 7:       },
 8:     },
 9:   },
10:   plugins: [],

<file path="eslint.config.js">
 1: import js from '@eslint/js';
 2: import tseslint from 'typescript-eslint';
 3: import reactPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-react';
 4: import reactHooksPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-react-hooks';
 5: import reactRefreshPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-react-refresh';
 6: import tailwindPlugin from 'eslint-plugin-tailwindcss';
 7: import globals from 'globals';
 8: import path from 'path';
 9: import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
10: const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
11: const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
12: const tailwindConfigPath = path.resolve(__dirname, 'packages/frontend/tailwind.config.js');
13: export default tseslint.config(
14:   {
15:     ignores: [
16:       '**/dist/**',
17:       '**/build/**',
18:       '**/node_modules/**',
19:       'eslint.config.js',
20:       'prettier.config.js',
21:       'tailwind.config.js',
22:       'postcss.config.js',
23:       'vite.config.ts',
24:     ],
25:   },
26:   js.configs.recommended,
27:   ...tseslint.configs.recommended,
28:   ...tseslint.configs.strict,
29:   ...tseslint.configs.stylistic,
30:   {
31:     files: ['**/*.ts', '**/*.tsx'],
32:     languageOptions: {
33:       parser: tseslint.parser,
34:       parserOptions: {
35:         ecmaVersion: 'latest',
36:         sourceType: 'module',
37:       },
38:       globals: {
39:         ...globals.browser,
40:         ...globals.node,
41:         ...globals.es2022,
42:       },
43:     },
44:     rules: {
45:       '@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any': 'error',
46:       '@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars': [
47:         'error',
48:         { argsIgnorePattern: '^_', varsIgnorePattern: '^_' },
49:       ],
50:     },
51:   },
52:   {
53:     ...reactPlugin.configs.flat.recommended,
54:     ...reactPlugin.configs.flat['jsx-runtime'],
55:     files: ['packages/frontend/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}'],
56:     plugins: {
57:       ...reactPlugin.configs.flat.recommended.plugins,
58:       ...reactPlugin.configs.flat['jsx-runtime'].plugins,

61:       tailwindcss: tailwindPlugin,
62:     },

74:     },

77:         version: 'detect',
78:       },

<file path="packages/backend/KindnessApp/GetKindnessLogsByUser.yml">
 1: info:
 2:   name: Get Kindness Logs By User
 3:   type: http
 4:   seq: 1
 5: http:
 6:   method: GET
 7:   url: https://kindnessapp.onrender.com/api/kindness/user/6a24ef9c5e1f33791367314a
 8:   auth: inherit
 9: settings:
10:   encodeUrl: true
11:   timeout: 0
12:   followRedirects: true
13:   maxRedirects: 5
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/controllers/kindness.controller.ts">
 1: import { Request, Response } from 'express';
 2: import { Types } from 'mongoose';
 3: import { KindnessLogSchema, KINDNESS_CATEGORIES } from '@kindness/shared';
 4: import { KindnessLogModel } from '../models/KindnessLog.js';
 5: import { UserModel } from '../models/User.js';
 6: export const createKindnessLog = async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
 7:   try {
 8:     const validationResult = KindnessLogSchema.safeParse(req.body);
 9:     if (!validationResult.success) {
10:       res.status(400).json({
11:         message: 'Validation failed',
12:         errors: validationResult.error.format()
13:       });
14:       return;
15:     }
16:     const { userId, category, description } = validationResult.data;
17:     const matchedCategoryConfig = Object.values(KINDNESS_CATEGORIES).find(
18:       (c) => c.label === category
19:     );
20:     if (!matchedCategoryConfig) {
21:       res.status(500).json({
22:         message: 'Configuration error: Category point mapping not found.'
23:       });
24:       return;
25:     }
26:     const pointsEarned = matchedCategoryConfig.points;
27:     const newLog = await KindnessLogModel.create({
28:       userId,
29:       category,
30:       pointsEarned,
31:       description
32:     });
33:     res.status(201).json({
34:       message: 'Kindness recorded successfully!',
35:       data: newLog
36:     });
37:   } catch (error) {
38:     console.error('[kindness.controller]: Error creating log:', error);
39:     res.status(500).json({
40:       message: 'An internal server error occurred while processing your request.'
41:     });
42:   }
43: };
44: export const getKindnessLogsByUser = async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
45:   try {
46:     const { userId } = req.params;
47:     if (!userId || !Types.ObjectId.isValid(userId)) {
48:       res.status(400).json({
49:         message: 'Invalid user ID format.'
50:       });
51:       return;
52:     }
53:     const userExists = await UserModel.exists({ _id: userId });
54:     if (!userExists) {
55:       res.status(404).json({
56:         message: 'User not found.'
57:       });
58:       return;
59:     }
60:     const logs = await KindnessLogModel.find({ userId }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
61:     res.status(200).json({
62:       message: 'Kindness logs retrieved successfully.',
63:       data: logs
64:     });
65:   } catch (error) {
66:     console.error('[kindness.controller]: Error getting logs for user:', error);
67:     res.status(500).json({
68:       message: 'An internal server error occurred while processing your request.'
69:     });
70:   }
71: };
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/routes/kindness.routes.ts">
 1: import { Router, Request, Response, NextFunction, RequestHandler } from 'express';
 2: import { createKindnessLog, getKindnessLogsByUser } from '../controllers/kindness.controller.js';
 3: const router = Router();
 4: const asyncHandler = (fn: (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => Promise<unknown>): RequestHandler =>
 5:   (req, res, next) => {
 6:     Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
 7:   };
 8: router.post('/', asyncHandler(createKindnessLog));
 9: router.get('/user/:userId', asyncHandler(getKindnessLogsByUser));
10: export default router;
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/tsconfig.json">
 1: {
 2:   "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json",
 3:   "compilerOptions": {
 4:     "outDir": "./dist",
 5:     "rootDir": "./src",
 6:     "composite": true
 7:   },
 8:   "references": [{ "path": "../shared" }],
 9:   "include": ["src/**/*"]
10: }
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/index.html">
 1: <!doctype html>
 2: <html lang="en">
 3:   <head>
 4:     <meta charset="UTF-8" />
 5:     <link
 6:       rel="icon"
 7:       type="image/svg+xml"
 8:       href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>💖</text></svg>"
 9:     />
10:     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
11:     <title>KindnessApp Monorepo</title>
12:     <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
13:     <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
14:     <link
15:       href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap"
16:       rel="stylesheet"
17:     />
18:   </head>
19:   <body class="min-h-screen bg-slate-950 text-slate-100">
20:     <div id="root"></div>
21:     <script type="module" src="/src/main.tsx"></script>
22:   </body>
23: </html>
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/tsconfig.json">
 1: {
 2:   "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json",
 3:   "compilerOptions": {
 4:     "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
 5:     "outDir": "./dist",
 6:     "rootDir": "./src",
 7:     "composite": true,
 8:     "jsx": "react-jsx",
 9:     "module": "ESNext",
10:     "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
11:     "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true
12:   },
13:   "references": [{ "path": "../shared" }],
14:   "include": ["src/**/*"]
15: }
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/vite.config.d.ts">
1: declare const _default: import("vite").UserConfig;
2: export default _default;
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/vite.config.js">
1: import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
2: import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react';
3: import tsconfigPaths from 'vite-tsconfig-paths';
4: export default defineConfig({
5:     plugins: [react(), tsconfigPaths()],
6:     server: {
7:         port: 3000,
8:     },
9: });
</file>

3: import tsconfigPaths from 'vite-tsconfig-paths';
4: export default defineConfig({
5:   plugins: [react(), tsconfigPaths()],
6:   server: {
7:     port: 3000,
8:   },

<file path="tsconfig.base.json">
 1: {
 2:   "compilerOptions": {
 3:     "target": "ES2022",
 4:     "module": "NodeNext",
 5:     "moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
 6:     "lib": ["ES2022"],
 7: 
 8:     /* Strict Type-Checking Options */
 9:     "strict": true,
10:     "noImplicitAny": true,
11:     "strictNullChecks": true,
12:     "strictFunctionTypes": true,
13:     "strictBindCallApply": true,
14:     "strictPropertyInitialization": true,
15:     "noImplicitThis": true,
16:     "alwaysStrict": true,
17: 
18:     /* Additional Checks */
19:     "noUnusedLocals": true,
20:     "noUnusedParameters": true,
21:     "noImplicitReturns": true,
22:     "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
23:     "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
24: 
25:     /* Modules & Resolution */
26:     "esModuleInterop": true,
27:     "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
28:     "skipLibCheck": true,
29: 
30:     /* Project References Outputs */
31:     "declaration": true,
32:     "declarationMap": true,
33:     "sourceMap": true
34:   }
35: }

6:     { "path": "./packages/frontend" },
7:     { "path": "./packages/frontend/tsconfig.node.json" }

<file path="package.json">
 1: {
 2:   "name": "kindness-monorepo",
 3:   "version": "1.0.0",
 4:   "private": true,
 5:   "type": "module",
 6:   "engines": {
 7:     "node": ">=18.0.0"
 8:   },
 9:   "workspaces": [
10:     "packages/*"
11:   ],
12:   "scripts": {
13:     "build": "tsc --build",
14:     "build:clean": "tsc --build --clean",
15:     "dev:shared": "tsc --build packages/shared --watch",
16:     "dev:backend": "npm run dev --workspace=@kindness/backend",
17:     "dev:frontend": "npm run dev --workspace=@kindness/frontend",
18:     "dev": "concurrently -n \"shared,backend,frontend\" -c \"blue,green,magenta\" \"npm run dev:shared\" \"npm run dev:backend\" \"npm run dev:frontend\"",
19:     "lint": "eslint .",
20:     "format": "prettier --write ."
21:   },
22:   "devDependencies": {
23:     "@eslint/js": "^9.4.0",
24:     "@types/node": "^20.14.2",
25:     "concurrently": "^8.2.2",
26:     "eslint": "^9.4.0",
27:     "eslint-plugin-react": "^7.34.2",
28:     "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^5.0.0",
29:     "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.7",
30:     "eslint-plugin-tailwindcss": "^3.17.3",
31:     "globals": "^15.3.0",
32:     "prettier": "^3.3.0",
33:     "prettier-plugin-tailwindcss": "^0.6.1",
34:     "tailwindcss": "^3.4.4",
35:     "typescript": "^5.4.5",
36:     "typescript-eslint": "^8.0.0"
37:   },
38:   "overrides": {

40:     "vite": {
41:       "esbuild": "^0.25.0"
42:     }

<file path="packages/backend/package.json">
 1: {
 2:   "name": "@kindness/backend",
 3:   "version": "1.0.0",
 4:   "private": true,
 5:   "type": "module",
 6:   "main": "./dist/index.js",
 7:   "scripts": {
 8:     "build": "tsc",
 9:     "dev": "tsx watch src/index.ts",
10:     "start": "node dist/index.js"
11:   },
12:   "dependencies": {
13:     "@kindness/shared": "*",
14:     "cors": "^2.8.5",
15:     "dotenv": "^16.4.5",
16:     "express": "^4.19.2",
17:     "mongoose": "^9.6.3"
18:   },
19:   "devDependencies": {
20:     "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
21:     "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
22:     "tsx": "^4.15.2"
23:   }
24: }
</file>

<file path="packages/backend/src/index.ts">
 1: import 'dotenv/config';
 2: import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
 3: import cors from 'cors';
 4: import { Server } from 'http';
 5: import { connectDatabase, disconnectDatabase } from './config/database.js';
 6: import kindnessRoutes from './routes/kindness.routes.js';
 7: import userRoutes from './routes/user.routes.js';
 8: const app = express();
 9: const port = process.env.PORT || 5000;
10: const allowedOrigin = process.env.FRONTEND_URL || 'http://localhost:3000';
11: app.use(
12:   cors({
13:     origin: allowedOrigin,
14:     credentials: true,
15:   })
16: );
17: app.use(express.json({ limit: '10kb' }));
18: app.use('/api/kindness', kindnessRoutes);
19: app.use('/api/users', userRoutes);
20: app.use((_req: Request, res: Response) => {
21:   res.status(404).json({ message: 'Resource not found' });
22: });
23: app.use((err: unknown, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
24:   console.error('[server]: Unhandled error:', err);
25:   res.status(500).json({ message: 'An internal server error occurred.' });
26: });
27: let server: Server;
28: async function startServer() {
29:   try {
30:     await connectDatabase();
31:     server = app.listen(port, () => {
32:       console.log(`[server]: Backend API running on http://localhost:${port}`);
33:     });
34:   } catch (error) {
35:     console.error('[server]: Error starting server:', error);
36:     process.exit(1);
37:   }
38: }
39: async function handleShutdown(signal: string) {
40:   console.log(`[server]: Received ${signal}. Starting graceful shutdown...`);
41:   if (server) {
42:     server.close(async (err) => {
43:       if (err) {
44:         console.error('[server]: Error closing HTTP server:', err);
45:       } else {
46:         console.log('[server]: HTTP server closed.');
47:       }
48:       try {
49:         await disconnectDatabase();
50:         process.exit(0);
51:       } catch (dbErr) {
52:         console.error('[server]: Error during database disconnection:', dbErr);
53:         process.exit(1);
54:       }
55:     });
56:   } else {
57:     try {
58:       await disconnectDatabase();
59:       process.exit(0);
60:     } catch (dbErr) {
61:       console.error('[server]: Error during database disconnection:', dbErr);
62:       process.exit(1);
63:     }
64:   }
65: }
66: process.on('SIGINT', () => handleShutdown('SIGINT'));
67: process.on('SIGTERM', () => handleShutdown('SIGTERM'));
68: startServer();
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/package.json">
 1: {
 2:   "name": "@kindness/frontend",
 3:   "version": "1.0.0",
 4:   "private": true,
 5:   "type": "module",
 6:   "scripts": {
 7:     "dev": "vite",
 8:     "build": "vite build",
 9:     "preview": "vite preview"
10:   },
11:   "dependencies": {
12:     "@kindness/shared": "*",
13:     "react": "^18.3.1",
14:     "react-dom": "^18.3.1"
15:   },
16:   "devDependencies": {
17:     "@types/react": "^18.3.3",
18:     "@types/react-dom": "^18.3.0",
19:     "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.0",
20:     "autoprefixer": "^10.4.19",
21:     "postcss": "^8.4.38",
22:     "tailwindcss": "^3.4.4",

25:   }

<file path="packages/frontend/src/App.tsx">
 1: export const App = () => {
 2:   return (
 3:     <div className="flex min-h-screen flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-50 p-6 text-center">
 4:       <div className="max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 bg-white p-8 shadow-xl">
 5:         <h1 className="mb-2 text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900">
 6:           Kindness Tracker
 7:         </h1>
 8:         <p className="mb-6 text-slate-600">
 9:           Your full-stack monorepo workspace is officially wired and ready for feature building!
10:         </p>
11:         <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-700">
12:           <span className="size-2 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>
13:           Shared Contract Active
14:         </div>
15:       </div>
16:     </div>
17:   );
18: };
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/src/index.css">
 1: @tailwind base;
 2: @tailwind components;
 3: @tailwind utilities;
 4: @layer base {
 5:   body {
 6:     font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
 7:     @apply bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 antialiased;
 8:   }
 9:   h1,
10:   h2,
11:   h3,
12:   h4,
13:   h5,
14:   h6 {
15:     font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
16:   }
17: }
18: .glow-card {
19:   position: relative;
20:   background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6);
21:   backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
22:   border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
23: }
24: .glow-card::before {
25:   content: '';
26:   position: absolute;
27:   inset: -1px;
28:   border-radius: inherit;
29:   padding: 1px;
30:   background: linear-gradient(
31:     to bottom right,
32:     rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.4),
33:     rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4),
34:     transparent
35:   );
36:   -webkit-mask:
37:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,
38:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
39:   mask:
40:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,
41:     linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
42:   -webkit-mask-composite: xor;
43:   mask-composite: exclude;
44:   pointer-events: none;
45: }
</file>

<file path="packages/frontend/src/main.tsx">
 1: import React from 'react';
 2: import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client';
 3: import { App } from './App.js';
 4: import './index.css';
 5: const container = document.getElementById('root');
 6: if (container) {
 7:   ReactDOM.createRoot(container).render(
 8:     <React.StrictMode>
 9:       <App />
10:     </React.StrictMode>
11:   );
12: }
</file>

<file path="packages/shared/src/index.ts">
 1: import { z } from 'zod';
 2: export const CATEGORY_LABELS = [
 3:   'Kind Words',
 4:   'Helping Hand',
 5:   'Sharing & Generosity',
 6:   'Special Surprise'
 7: ] as const;
 8: export const KINDNESS_CATEGORIES = {
 9:   WORDS: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[0], points: 10 },
10:   HELPING: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[1], points: 20 },
11:   SHARING: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[2], points: 15 },
12:   CUSTOM: { label: CATEGORY_LABELS[3], points: 25 }
13: } as const;
14: export const UserSchema = z.object({
15:   name: z
16:     .string()
17:     .trim()
18:     .min(1, 'Name is required')
19:     .max(100, 'Name cannot exceed 100 characters')
20: });
21: export const KindnessLogSchema = z.object({
22:   userId: z
23:     .string()
24:     .min(1, 'A valid user ID is required'),
25:   category: z.enum(CATEGORY_LABELS, {
26:     errorMap: () => ({ message: 'Please select a valid kindness category' })
27:   }),
28:   description: z
29:     .string()
30:     .trim()
31:     .max(200, 'Description cannot exceed 200 characters')
32:     .optional()
33:     .transform(val => (val === '' ? undefined : val))
34: });
35: export type User = z.infer<typeof UserSchema>;
36: export type KindnessCategoryMap = typeof KINDNESS_CATEGORIES;
37: export type KindnessLog = z.infer<typeof KindnessLogSchema>;
</file>

</files>
